title: gamocarpha graminea
intro: Gamocarpha graminea, also known as the grass-leaved gamocarpha, is a plant species that belongs to the family Compositae (now Asteraceae). This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Gamocarpha graminea include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Gamocarpha graminea can be prepared as an infusion, tea, or tincture, and its leaves and stems are often used in herbal preparations for their medicinal value.
